div.h1: Cache Miss Count: Tree Size Scaling
div.p: Log-log plot showing cache misses vs tree size (N)
B = 16 keys per cache line vEB achieves cache-optimal scaling

ul.li: vEB: O(log_B N) where B = keys/cache-line

div.p: vEB layout achieves O(log_B N) cache complexity cache-obliviously.

ul.li: No hardware parameters required in code
